description_for_model: The protocol layer of intelligence. 1255 real APIs for AI agents: compute, crypto, text, network, memory, orchestration, multi-LLM (Claude/GPT/Grok/DeepSeek). Free persistent memory. Agent organizations with 30+ agents. Workflows, telemetry, eval, compare. Self-hostable.
description_for_human: AI agent infrastructure — 1255 APIs, multi-LLM orchestration, free persistent memory
